name: nexora
description: Nexora self-hosted messenger for Windows, PWA and Android
author: Nexora

scripts.check: node scripts/check-syntax.cjs && node scripts/check-electron-builder-config.cjs && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run build:web && npm run test:unit && npm run test:performance
scripts.test:cloud: node --test test/pulse-cloud.test.cjs test/cloud-identity.test.cjs test/cloud-workers.test.cjs test/pulse-cloud-management.test.cjs test/pulse-catalog-3.3.test.cjs
scripts.test:pulse-local: node --test test/pulse-schema7.test.cjs test/pulse-local-repository.test.cjs test/pulse-cloud-client.test.cjs test/pulse-local-integration.test.cjs test/pulse-sync-worker.test.cjs test/pulse-sandbox-service.test.cjs
scripts.release:check: node scripts/sync-release-metadata.cjs --check && npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:performance && npm run audit:security
scripts.dist:client: npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.client.yml --win nsis
scripts.dist:server: npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.server.yml --win nsis
scripts.dist:windows: npm run dist:client && npm run dist:server
scripts.release:windows: npm run release:check && npm run dist:windows
scripts.release:windows:signed: npm run release:check && npm run release:signing-check && npm run dist:windows
